description_long: This object is a realistic peach with a rounded, slightly flattened shape and a subtle crease running from the top to the bottom. The skin displays a gradient of colors, ranging from pale yellow to soft pink and reddish hues, with a velvety texture typical of peaches. One side is cut open, revealing the fibrous, yellowish flesh and a large, textured brown pit at the center. The surface shows some natural blemishes and color variations, adding to its lifelike appearance. The top of the peach features a small indentation where the stem would attach, though no stem or leaf is present. The overall appearance suggests a ripe, juicy fruit ready to be eaten.
description: A lifelike, round peach with a velvety yellow-pink skin and a cut side exposing the pit and fibrous flesh.
description_view_0: The cut side of the peach is visible, showing the large brown pit and yellowish flesh with fibrous texture.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rounded, uncut side with a soft gradient of yellow and pink, and a small indentation at the top.
description_view_2: The back of the peach is visible, showing a smooth, slightly flattened surface with subtle color blending and no cut.
description_view_3: A side view showing the transition between the cut and uncut surfaces, with visible color variation and some surface blemishes.
